metadata.title: MYLO - Your Travel Concierge
metadata.description: MYLO is your AI-powered travel assistant for optimal flight search, Miles & Points advice, and Premium Cabin upgrades.

auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address
resetPassword.emailSentMessage: Check your inbox for further instructions.
resetPassword.sendErrorRetry: Error sending email. Please try again later.
resetPassword.emailSentSuccess: Password reset email has been sent!

resetPasswordConfirm.title: Set new password
resetPasswordConfirm.subtitle: Choose a secure new password
resetPasswordConfirm.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
resetPasswordConfirm.resetErrorExpired: Error resetting password. The link may have expired.

subscriptionExpired.title: Your access has expired
subscriptionExpired.description: Your subscription is no longer active. To continue using MYLO, you need to renew your subscription.
subscriptionExpired.renewHint: Renew your subscription via our pricing page
subscriptionExpired.supportHint: Contact our support for any questions
subscriptionExpired.dataHint: Your data and chats remain saved

settings.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters long

chatHistory.chatDeleteError: Error deleting chat. Please try again.
chatHistory.deleteConfirm: Delete {title}? Press Enter to confirm, Escape to cancel
chatHistory.loginPrompt: Sign in to seamlessly view, search, and manage all your previous conversations.
chatHistory.noResults: Try a different search term or change the search mode
chatHistory.renameHint: Click to rename • Click to delete

chat.noResponse: It looks like the assistant didn't provide a response to your message.

checkout.completePayment: Complete your one-time payment for MYLO Pro

loyalty.addPrograms: Add programs in AwardWallet to see them here.
